block_00: The killer feature is finally here — try Margin Trading on Android!
block_03: We’re excited to announce that Margin Trading is now available in IQ Option's Android application! With this release, we aimed to provide you with a sophisticated and professional trading experience amplified by intuitive mobile usability. Trade like a pro on mobile!
block_04: How to activate Margin Trading on Android
block_05: To get access to Margin Trading on mobile, you need
block_06: to update the app on Google Play.
block_07: Once you open the app, a "Margin Trading" popup will show up. Click on the "Enable" button to activate the feature.
block_08: You can also switch on Margin Trading in the balance selector.
